title: District & Sessions Judge Angul – Junior Clerk cum Copyist, Stenographer and More – 18 Posts

basic_details.job_title: District & Sessions Judge Angul Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 18 Junior Clerk cum Copyist, Stenographer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District & Sessions Judge Angul Recruitment 2026 offers 18 vacancies for Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Stenographer Grade-III, and Salaried Amin posts. Eligible candidates with +3, Diploma or Matriculation qualification can apply offline through the official website angul.dcourts.gov.in on or before 18-06-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institute, Matriculation

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District & Sessions Judge Angul Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
